name: spotifybu
description: SpotifyBU is a web app for backing up Spotify playlist metadata and preparing authorized media backups.

scripts.test: tsx --test src/lib/providers/scoring.test.mts src/lib/providers/search-query.test.mts src/lib/providers/tagging.test.mts src/lib/providers/download.test.mts src/lib/spotify.test.mts src/lib/music-library-auto-scan.test.mts src/lib/music-library.test.mts src/lib/organize-settings.test.mts src/lib/plex.test.mts
